interactiveCharacterReplacementPrompt: Replace the original main character of the template character image with the reference character of the reference character image. When replacing the character, the exact same pose, the exact same action, the exact same facing direction, the exact same body orientation, the exact same head angle, the exact same arm and leg positions, the exact same hands, the exact same height, the exact same size and the exact same scale, and the exact same facial expression of the original main character of template character image must be perfectly applied to the replaced character. Strictly transfer the exact same pose, the exact same action and the exact same direction of body, the exact same height, the exact same size and the exact same scale of the original main character onto the replaced character without any changes. Enforce a clean solid pure white background (#FFFFFF) with no gradients, no shadows, no artifacts, no floor, or any other elements. High-quality, sharp details, 500x500 PNG.
personTemplateOutfitPrompt: The replaced reference character must wear the same costumes, clothes, and outfit as the original main character of the template image (including trousers, tops, shoes, and any visible accessories or symbols).
storyPageRulesPrompt:
TEMPLATE LOCK (HIGHEST PRIORITY):
- Keep the provided template artwork structurally unchanged.
- Do not redesign background layout, props, perspective, camera, or composition.
- If any instruction conflicts with template preservation, preserve the template and adapt only character integration.
- Mood/style updates must be subtle and global (light/tone/color grading), not repainting.

STORY-TO-SCENE MAPPING (SECOND PRIORITY):
- Use the exact page story text as the source of truth for action, emotion, and atmosphere.
- Keep expressions, body language, and lighting aligned with this page's emotional beat.
- If the story text implies calm or sleep, prefer gentle, natural poses over exaggerated action.

PAGE STORY TEXT (SOURCE OF TRUTH):
{story_text}

SCENE SIGNALS DERIVED FROM STORY:
- Character Action: {character_action}
- Character Emotion: {derived_emotion}
- Atmosphere: {derived_atmosphere}

POSE CONSTRAINTS:
- Avoid static front-facing, T-pose, idle, or reference-sheet poses.
- Use movement and posture that match the story beat (active, gentle, or sleepy as needed).
- Body language and facial expression must reinforce the page emotion.

FACIAL CONSISTENCY (CRITICAL ACROSS PAGES 1-5):
- Keep the same core facial features from the reference in every story scene (face shape, eyes, eyebrows, nose, mouth, ears).
- Do not add, remove, or swap facial features between pages (example: if the character has a visible nose, it must remain visible in all main story scenes).
- Maintain recognizable facial proportions and feature placement while only changing expression for the page emotion.

COMPANION CONSTRAINTS:
- Always include the ally companion with the main character in every story scene page (1-5).
- The ally companion should be clearly visible and naturally interacting with the main character.

LAYOUT CONSTRAINTS:
- Always position the main character on the LEFT HALF of the page scene (for story pages 1-5).
- Keep the character fully within the left half and preserve template composition.

forest.tempMainStoryPagePrompt: The main girl/boy character of template background image must be removed and replaced with the character of reference character image. The replaced reference character must be less than the size and scale of original girl character of template background image. Replace the main girl/boy character of template background image with the character of reference character image keeping the appearance of the reference image character. When replacing and integrating, the pose of emotions of the character of reference character image must be not kept. The replaced character should precisely match the pose, action, appearance (facial and body features), emotions, scale and size and height of the original girl/boy main character of the template background image. All other characters and elements from the template background image must be kept and integrated seamlessly. The background of template image must be kept - never changed. Just integrate the character of the reference character image into the template background image as the new main character instead of original boy main character keeping the appearance and height of the character of reference character image, ensuring lighting and style are perfectly blended. Output quality and compositing (critical): deliver one unified high-resolution illustration—never a low-resolution, pixelated, or visibly upscaled cutout on the template. The replaced character must match the background's sharpness, detail, and grain; avoid blocky pixels, stair-stepped edges, JPEG blocking, banding, halos, and color fringing. Use smooth anti-aliased contours, natural contact shadows, and lighting consistent with the scene. Re-render the character at full native resolution in the same illustrative style as the template rather than stretching soft reference pixels; face, hands, and clothing must stay crisp at 4K. Please don't add any effect image and additional items to the template background. Generate the final image in stunning 4K resolution with an aspect ratio of 3:2 (width:height).

pageMainCharacterPoseActionEmotionPrompt.1: 3D Pixar-style forest adventure. The main boy character wears a green explorer jacket, cargo pants, hiking boots, and a large brown backpack. Inside a warm wooden cabin, he stands leaning slightly toward a tall arched window, body angled to the glass, head turned to peer out at a night forest. His right hand is raised near his chest in quiet wonder; his face shows curiosity, a soft gentle smile, and wide eyes. Warm lantern light on the sill contrasts with cool twilight outside. He is placed slightly left of center. When replacing and integrating, the pose and emotion of the reference character image must not be kept; match this template pose and emotion.
pageMainCharacterPoseActionEmotionPrompt.2: 3D stylized night forest. The same boy with backpack stands on a grassy path in an enchanted woodland with teal and deep-blue light, god rays, and glowing particles. He holds a large aged map open with both hands in front of him and looks down at it with a focused, calm, determined expression—reading the map to find his way. Beside him, the small orange fox ally wears a tiny backpack and stands on hind legs looking at a scrap of map, mirroring him. They are positioned a little left of center; the fox stays close beside the boy on reader perspective.
pageMainCharacterPoseActionEmotionPrompt.3: 3D medieval stone hall with torches, barrels, treasure, and a tall arched window showing daylight sky. The boy with backpack and compass necklace (map in belt) shares a joyful moment with the fox ally (also with a small pack and compass necklace). Use the energetic pose: boy stands facing forward, right arm extended to the side with an open palm, left arm raised high making a V or peace sign, mouth open in a cheer or laugh; the fox perches excitedly on the boy's head with paws raised and a big grin. Alternatively the welcoming variant: boy angles slightly right, right arm extended toward the fox in a presenting gesture with a warm closed-mouth smile; fox on the ground on hind legs waving one paw. They are a little left of center with clear spacing between them.
pageMainCharacterPoseActionEmotionPrompt.4: 3D magical forest clearing at night: crescent moon, stars, stylized trees, glowing pink-orange mushrooms, fireflies, and a wooden signpost. The boy with backpack is mid-stride in the grass or pausing in the clearing—wonderstruck—looking up at the moon or toward a firefly, or walking toward the signpost with curiosity and slight trepidation turned to peaceful awe. Emotion: wonder, curiosity, readiness for adventure. He stays slightly left of center with readable silhouette.
pageMainCharacterPoseActionEmotionPrompt.5: 3D whimsical magical forest with treehouses, rope bridges, river, waterfalls, and warm lantern glow. The boy with backpack crosses a long swaying rope bridge over the river mid-stride, right hand holding a small glowing wooden lantern to light his path—adventurous, focused, steady—or stands by a campfire ledge with lantern, observing the scene with quiet curiosity and peace. Clear backpack visibility. Slightly left of center for composition.

1.text: MEET [CHARACTER NAME] - INTRODUCTION Narrative: Establishing fear of darkness, hint at special ability. Character: Standing in cozy home, looking toward dark window. Visible expression: Brave but hesitant.

2.text: [Character Name] notices something magical glimmering in the darkness. It's calling to them. [Character Name] realizes that FERN, a friendly forest fox, might know about this mystery. Together, they might discover something wonderful! Are you ready to help [Character Name] and Fern find what's hidden in the darkness?

3.text: I can see lights from the castle. The path begins here. I choose to move forward

4.text: The path is glowing! Look at all these beautiful lights showing me the way! And I'm not alone—there are friends here too!

5.text: We're all walking this path together! Other friends are here too. I'm brave. I'm excited to arrive!

6.text: We did it! The castle is right here! My friends are here. I'm ready!

7.text: Castle is sanctuary; magic discovered inside themselves; [SPECIAL_ABILITY] prepared them; finding home and purpose
Night feels different; shadows become friends; fear transforms to opportunity; carries castle's warmth home; dreams of infinite possibilities

underwater.tempMainStoryPagePrompt: Use the template story page image as the fixed cartoon composition. Replace only the template main character with the reference character, preserving identity while matching template pose/action/emotion/scale. Keep all underwater environment details unchanged. This is an interactive search story page; keep composition clear, uncluttered, and child-friendly for clue finding. Do not add unrelated objects. Output quality (critical): single high-res composite—no pixelated pasted cutout, blocky edges, halos, or resolution mismatch; match template sharpness and lighting; crisp character at full output. Output 4K, 3:2 aspect ratio.
